title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: School Restaurant
questions.text: Students who ordered pasta for lunch should join the left queue today. The right queue is for sandwiches and salads only. Please have your student card ready before reaching the till.
questions.question: What are students told to do?

options.A: Use the correct queue for their lunch.
options.B: Order pasta after reaching the till.
options.C: Leave student cards in the classroom.

questions.explanation: Students should join different queues depending on their lunch.

questions.heading: Message from Molly to Ryan
questions.text: Ryan, I’ve found a quieter place for our interview with Grandpa. The kitchen is too busy, so let’s use the spare room. I’ve already put two chairs and the recorder there.
questions.question: What is Molly doing?

options.A: Explaining where they should record the interview.
options.B: Asking Ryan to bring recording equipment.
options.C: Saying Grandpa is too busy to talk.

questions.explanation: Molly has moved the interview to the spare room.

questions.heading: Weekend Climbing
questions.text: Try indoor climbing with qualified instructors this weekend. All safety equipment is provided. Participants under fourteen must climb in the morning session because extra instructors are available then.
questions.question: What does the advert say?

options.A: Younger climbers must attend at a particular time.
options.B: Climbers need to bring their own equipment.
options.C: Only adults can try climbing this weekend.

questions.explanation: Under-fourteens must attend the morning session.

questions.heading: From: Olivia / Subject: The video
questions.text: I watched the video for our geography project. The first half is useful, especially the maps, but the second half is about a different country. We probably shouldn’t use that part.
questions.question: What does Olivia think?

options.A: Only some of the video is useful.
options.B: The maps are about the wrong country.
options.C: None of the video helps their project.

questions.explanation: Olivia says the first half is useful but the second half is not.

questions.heading: Borrowed Sports Equipment
questions.text: Please return basketballs and tennis rackets to the store cupboard after use. Equipment left outside may be damaged by rain. Report broken items to a teacher before putting them away.
questions.question: What does the label ask students to do?

options.A: Put equipment away and report problems.
options.B: Leave wet equipment outside the cupboard.
options.C: Repair broken items without telling anyone.

questions.explanation: Students should return equipment and report broken items.
